message:
feat(runtime): add VOI sampler introspection API and fix scrollbar width

voi_sampling.rs:
- Add last_decision and last_observation tracking fields
- Expose config(), posterior_params(), posterior_mean(), posterior_variance()
- Add expected_variance_after() for lookahead calculations
- Add last_decision() and last_observation() accessors
- These APIs enable external monitoring and debugging of VOI decisions

scrollbar.rs:
- Fix VerticalRight positioning to account for wide character widths
- Use symbol_width.max(1) to properly position multi-cell characters
- Pass correct max_x to draw_text_span for wide character rendering
- Fixes display issues with Unicode scrollbar symbols (▓, ░, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
